title: T-039 — POST /consume-to-wo (intermediate cascade core) (06-d)
prompt:
# T-039 — consume-to-WO

PRD: 06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §8.4 FR-SC-BE-044, §15.4 V-SCAN-WO-001..004; 05-WH §10 intermediate
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Land `POST /production/scanner/consume-to-wo` — the intermediate cascade core. Validates WO IN_PROGRESS, LP available, LP product matches wo_material (RM or intermediate), qty bounds, qa_status allowed; transactionally updates LP qty (partial → reduce, full → status='consumed'), inserts wo_material_consumption with source='scanner', updates lp_genealogy operation_type='consume' + wo_id, emits outbox event lp.consumed.

## Implementation contract
1. Body Zod `{ wo_id, lp_id, qty_consumed, reason_code? }`.
2. Idempotent via X-Client-Operation-Id.
3. LP qa_status block list per V-WH-SCAN-003 (hold/blocked).
4. Single transaction wraps all writes + outbox emit.

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/app/api/production/scanner/consume-to-wo/route.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/server/services/production-consume.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/api/production-consume.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given LP X qty=50, WO Y IN_PROGRESS, BOM matches, when POST /consume-to-wo with qty_consumed=20 runs, then LP X.qty=30 stays available, wo_material_consumption is inserted, lp_genealogy is updated, and an outbox lp.consumed event is queued — all in one transaction
2. Given WO Y not in IN_PROGRESS, when POST runs, then 409 SC_WO_NOT_IN_PROGRESS and no rows are mutated
3. Given LP X qa_status='hold', when POST runs, then 409 SC_LP_QA_HOLD and no rows are mutated

## Test strategy
- RED: write production-consume.test.ts asserting partial-consume artifacts + WO state block + qa-hold block before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test api/production-consume'

## Risk red lines
- Do not split the writes across multiple transactions
- Do not skip outbox emit
- Do not let consume bypass qa_status block

pipeline_inputs.description: Intermediate cascade core: validate WO/LP/qty/qa, transactionally update LP+consumption+genealogy + outbox emit.
pipeline_inputs.details: Single POST handler. Validates WO state, LP state, qty bounds, qa_status. Transaction writes wo_material_consumption (source='scanner'), reduces LP qty (mark consumed if zero), updates lp_genealogy, emits outbox lp.consumed. Idempotent via X-Client-Operation-Id.
out_of_scope: Do not implement SCN-080/081 UI here (T-041)
Do not implement supervisor force-consume override

Given WO Y not in IN_PROGRESS, when POST runs, then 409 SC_WO_NOT_IN_PROGRESS and no rows are mutated
Given LP X qa_status='hold', when POST runs, then 409 SC_LP_QA_HOLD and no rows are mutated
